title: Announcements

Announcements

Okan Homepage

Announcements

The ALAT English Preparatory Academic Placement Exam

22
						September

2025

Dear students,

For our students who have enrolled through DGS, the Academic Placement Test will be held online on Thursday, September 25. The exam will be conducted via the O’Learn platform. You are required to complete the necessary technical preparations on the O’Learn platform before the exam. Information regarding access to the platform will be communicated through O’Learn prior to the exam. Students who wish to apply for the exam can simply send their requests to

aleyna.acikalin@okan.edu.tr

Students who score

70 or above on this exam

will be eligible to take the

face-to-face OPAE proficiency exam on Friday, September 26

.

We wish you success.

en

tr
